title: MMi Daily Iron Ore Index Report November 18 2022
section_path: MMi Daily Iron Ore Index Report November 18 2022
section_path_text: MMi Daily Iron Ore Index Report November 18 2022
summary:
Main
in Chinese iron ore and steelmaking prices 18/11/2022
DCE iron ore futures rose by 3.29% today, the main contract closed 753.5. The traders' willingness to ship is general.The steel mills are purchase on demand. The overall trading sentiment of the market is less.
